data.content: History now discovers related worktree log roots (sibling -wt- dirs, nested .claude/worktrees, and .knots/_worktree) when repoPath is provided, so sessions logged from dedicated worktrees are included. Added regression tests for sibling and nested worktree root inclusion. Quality gates: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed to origin/main at 0dc2cea.
